write_file({"path": "internal/engine/language_tiers_test.go", "contents": "package engine_test\n\nimport (\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/discovery\"\n\t\"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/engine\"\n)\n\nfunc TestTierRegistry_AllKnownLanguagesHaveTiers(t *testing.T) {\n\tfor _, lang := range discovery.KnownLanguages() {\n\t\ttier := engine.TierForLanguage(lang)\n\t\tif tier == engine.TierNone {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"language %q has no tier entry (got TierNone); every known language must have a defined tier\", lang)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestTierRegistry_UnknownLanguageReturnsGeneric(t *testing.T) {\n\tgot := engine.TierForLanguage(\"nonsense-language\")\n\tif got != engine.TierGeneric {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierForLanguage(%q) = %v, want TierGeneric\", \"nonsense-language\", got)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestTierRegistry_SwiftIsGeneric(t *testing.T) {\n\tgot := engine.TierForLanguage(\"swift\")\n\tif got != engine.TierGeneric {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierForLanguage(%q) = %v, want TierGeneric\", \"swift\", got)\n\t}\n}\n"}) → wrote internal/engine/language_tiers_test.go (911 bytes)
